description: Neural network architectures like transformer, BERT, GPT, LLaMA, or specific model designs, CNN - convolutional neural network
Model parameters, hyperparameters, configuration values like learning rate, batch size, hidden dimensions
Training, validation, or test datasets mentioned by name (e.g., ImageNet, C4, The Pile)
Performance metrics and evaluation measures (accuracy, F1, perplexity, BLEU score), ASR - attack success rate, ROC - Receiver Operating Characteristic
ML methods, training techniques, or approaches (fine-tuning, RLHF, attention mechanism), CAM - class activated mapping
ML libraries, frameworks, or tools (PyTorch, TensorFlow, Hugging Face Transformers)
